'''Vlanth Shipping Suppliers''' was a manufacturing company that specialized in equipment intended to assist the loading and unloading of cargo onto [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. Their products consisted of basic equipment such as the [[Cargo Grippers]] [[crate hook]]s and [[LG70 Loader's Gloves]].<ref name="PSG" />

==Sources==
